bitbucket: will be pushed to Novateur/vlincs_reid_by_search branch wisc; package path reports/vlincs_iterations/20260624_feature_outlier_combo_p005_gain/
environment: no anchors; GT used only by evaluator after assignment materialization
implementation: The proposer reads only the current assignment CSV and no-anchor feature NPZs. For each source component it scores tracklets whose source centroid support is weak or locally conflicted, then searches target components with no temporal overlap. A candidate must clear target centroid similarity, centroid margin, neighbor margin and multi-view vote thresholds. The reviewer first direct-scores diverse single moves, then composes positive non-overlapping moves. Only the four-move combo is sent to density_simple and p005_area.
module_detail: M5 fuses weakmetric, DINOv2 and SigLIP feature evidence; M8 moves only local feature-outlier islands; M10 tests single and combo repairs; M12 validates through density_simple plus p005_area.
next: Use this feature-outlier reviewer as an opponent gate for generated positives: only image-generated positives that point to one of these local outlier islands and pass DINO/SigLIP source CTF should be tried. Keep whole-component generated-positive merges killed.

per_video_table.note: canonical aggregate IDF1 after density_simple + p005_area

summary: A scratch no-anchor feature-outlier reviewer found four one-tracklet islands that were more consistent with alternate components across weakmetric, DINOv2 and SigLIP. The promoted combo moves seq2354 4->0, seq685 86->91, seq9343 45->26, and seq5628 20->3. Canonical p005_area improves from 0.668332 to 0.668508.
title: No-anchor feature-outlier combo p005 gain
used_in_pipeline: yes: promoted as the new default no-anchor replay assignment after direct, density_simple and valid p005_area scoring

visual_cases.failure_reason: The old graph kept this visual outlier inside its source component even though multi-view feature evidence preferred a different component.
visual_cases.improvement: The new reviewer moves only the local outlier and keeps the surrounding component untouched; delivery is accepted only after direct, density_simple, and p005_area validation.
visual_cases.summary: Three sampled bbox frames show the exact tracklet before/after global ID in the promoted four-tracklet combo.

workflow_steps.action: compute source centroid, target centroid, neighbor margin and multi-view vote for each possible local relink
workflow_steps.input: current best assignment plus weakmetric/DINOv2/SigLIP tracklet features

workflow_steps.action: materialize only local relinks; do not merge whole components
direct-score ranks 01-05, kill rank02, keep four positives, and compose compatible positives
run density_simple then p005_area with config_name validation and dropped-row check
